case_title: REEVES IMMIGRATION LAW GROUP VS. DIANA JOYCE GOZUN BAGANG

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-19-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REEVES IMMIGRATION LAW GROUP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAGANG, DIANA JOYCE GOZUN $900.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $945.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF REEVES IMMIGRATION LAW GROUP AS TO DEFENDANT BAGANG, DIANA JOYCE GOZUN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-19-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-19-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. . PLAINTIFF REEVES IMMIGRATION LAW GROUP IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY FLOMY DIZA, PARTNER/LAWYER. DEFENDANT DIANA JOYCE GOZUN BAGANG IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
